auth.name: Full Name

screening.title: Mental Health Screening
screening.instructions: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following?
screening.consent_text: This screening tool is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a clinical diagnosis. By proceeding, you consent to your responses being stored securely and analyzed to provide you with personalized insights. You can delete your data at any time.

phq9_questions.q1: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
phq9_questions.q3: Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
phq9_questions.q4: Feeling tired or having little energy
phq9_questions.q6: Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down
phq9_questions.q7: Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television
phq9_questions.q8: Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite — being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual
phq9_questions.q9: Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or thoughts of hurting yourself in some way

gad7_questions.q1: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
gad7_questions.q2: Not being able to stop or control worrying
gad7_questions.q3: Worrying too much about different things
gad7_questions.q5: Being so restless that it's hard to sit still
gad7_questions.q7: Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen

chat.title: MindBot

chat.welcome: Hi there! I'm MindBot, your mental health companion. I'm here to listen and support you. How are you feeling today?

tools.title: Therapeutic Toolkit
tools.mood_before: How are you feeling right now? (1-10)
tools.session_saved: Your session has been saved to your profile.
tools.reflect_desc: A gentle 3-step journaling practice to process your thoughts.
tools.reflect_prompt_1: What is one thing that went well today?
tools.reflect_prompt_2: What is one challenge you faced and how did you handle it?
tools.reflect_prompt_3: What are you looking forward to tomorrow?
tools.jacobson_desc: Guided progressive relaxation to release physical tension.
tools.cbt_desc: Analyze and reframe negative thought patterns using CBT.
tools.cbt_feeling: How did you feel? (Select all that apply)
tools.cbt_behavior: What did you do in response?
tools.worries_desc: Categorize worries into controllable vs uncontrollable.
tools.organise_desc: Plan your day with priority-based task management.
tools.suggested_tools: Based on your result, we recommend these tools:
